name: polymarket-weather-trading-bot
desc: Polymarket weather trading bot - A TypeScript bot that trades Polymarket daily-high temperature markets. It builds a probability distribution of each city's hi…
descFull: Polymarket weather trading bot - A TypeScript bot that trades Polymarket daily-high temperature markets. It builds a probability distribution of each city's high (Open-Meteo ensemble + NWS), converts it into per-°C-bucket odds, compares against the live CLOB order book, and places fractional-Kelly–sized bets, Polymarket weather trading bot
